history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a split-screen view with the same person posing in two similar selfie-style shots.

Main Subject:
A young person with long dark hair and large, clear-framed eyeglasses is shown from the upper body up, facing the camera. They rest their left hand under their chin with their fingers near the jawline, and their head tilts slightly while looking toward the camera. The person wears small hoop earrings and a delicate necklace with a small pendant.

Setting:
The photos appear to be taken indoors. The background includes light-colored walls and a horizontal reddish trim line. A dark rectangular object is partially visible on the right side of the frame, and a pink item is faintly visible near it.

Visual Details:
The lighting is soft and even, creating a mild shine on the glasses. The person’s outfit includes a sleeveless red-and-white checkered garment beneath a light gray top with black printed shapes across the chest. Their hair falls over the shoulders and down the right side of the frame. The camera angle is close and slightly above or level with the face, emphasizing facial features and glasses. The overall composition is centered on the face, with the hand positioned under the chin.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
Two nearly identical selfies show a person with long dark hair and clear-framed glasses posing with their hand under their chin. The indoor background features a light wall with a reddish trim and partially visible objects on the right.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text detected in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No visible/legible text found]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be a photo with no clearly readable UI text, captions, or documents.
- There is some dark text-like print on the shirt, but it is not legible enough to extract accurately.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A split image, top and bottom, features a close-up portrait of a young East Asian woman wearing large, square-rimmed glasses with a subtle blue light filter tint. She has long, dark, wavy hair that frames her face and falls over her shoulders. Her hand is raised, with her chin resting delicately on her index finger, and her other fingers gently touching her cheek. She is wearing a grey tank top with a red and white checkered pattern visible on the shoulder strap and upper chest area. A thin gold chain necklace with a small pink pendant hangs around her neck. She has a soft, gentle expression and her makeup is subtle with rosy cheeks and glossy lips. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The background is slightly blurred, with hints of a neutral-toned wall and possibly some shelving or furniture. The overall mood is serene, youthful, and aesthetically pleasing. The color palette is dominated by soft skin tones, dark hair, muted grey and red of her top, and the warm tones of the lighting.
